articles.author: Katie Kindelan
articles.title: Woman gives birth to rare identical quadruplet daughters - ABC7 Los Angeles
articles.description: Jenitar Sau Na'amoana, 34, gave birth to her daughters in Queensland, Australia.
articles.content:
A woman in Australia has given birth to a rare set of identical quadruplet daughters after a pregnancy her doctor described as "unheard of."
Jenitar Sau Na'amoana, 34, gave birth to her quadruplets … [+1659 chars]
